comment: Minimal 1-knob plugin. Validates the v2 full-ELF builder + tests whether firmware auto-populates params[5] under NOP handlers.
gid_comment: 0x02 = Filter category. SONAME prefix becomes ZDL_FLT_.
fxid_comment: 0x0190 = above the highest stock effect (0x0180), avoids collisions.

params.name: Mix
params.comment: params[6]. Dry/wet blend. Bumped from 1 to 2 knobs because the firmware does not appear to support nknobs=1 (no stock effect uses it; v2 GAIN with 1 knob froze on edit-mode entry).

audio_nop_comment: Set true to ship a UI-only smoke build (audio function replaced with NOP_RETURN). Useful when bisecting boot freezes.
